calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike Complaint Or For More Definite Statement
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Salvatore Cortara, 415-810-7103 defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SALVATORE CORTARA'S Motion To Strike Complaint Or For More Definite Statement IS DENIED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND OPPOSE THE TENTATIVE RULING THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Motion To Strike Complaint Or For More Definite Statement
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Continued To Jan-26-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT SALVATORE CORTARA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT OR FOR MORE DEFINITE STATEMENT is continued to January 26, 2010 on the Court's own motion. Parties to provide courtesy copies to the Court by January 21, 2010. (301/AJR) Judge A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
